inputs.label: Months
inputs.businessContext: Total number of months to convert to years

inputs.label: Months per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of months in a year (typically 12)

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the years output

inputs.label: Output Mode
inputs.businessContext: 0 = decimal years only, 1 = years and months breakdown (not used in primary)

formulas.yearsRounded: Math.round((months / monthsPerYear) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)
